Interface IMultidimensionalDataset5

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a multidimensional dataset.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("F04281CC-5441-4F50-9D09-613B400FC52D")]
public interface IMultidimensionalDataset5 : IMultidimensionalDataset4, IMultidimensionalDataset3, IMultidimensionalDataset2, IMultidimensionalDataset
